targets.rawSql: SELECT total_eur::float AS value FROM net_worth_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(crypto_value_eur, 0)::float AS value FROM net_worth_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT account_count AS value FROM net_worth_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1

options.content: Mixed-currency warning: latest snapshot has mixed_currency=true. Headline total sums native balances without FX.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN mixed_currency THEN '⚠ Mixed currencies — no FX conversion' ELSE 'Single reporting currency' END AS info FROM net_worth_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT elem->>'name' AS name, elem->>'account_role' AS role, elem->>'currency' AS currency, (elem->>'balance')::float AS balance FROM (SELECT payload FROM net_worth_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1) latest CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(latest.payload->'accounts') AS elem ORDER BY ABS((elem->>'balance')::float) DESC

options.content: Detailed wealth analysis (per-account trends, crypto allocation) is also available in the React **Wealth** page at `/wealth`.

targets.rawSql: (SELECT 'Firefly' AS metric, COALESCE(firefly_value_eur, total_eur)::float AS value FROM net_worth_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1) UNION ALL (SELECT 'Crypto', COALESCE(crypto_value_eur, 0)::float FROM net_worth_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1)

options.content: FX incomplete: one or more crypto assets could not be priced in EUR.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(payload->>'fx_incomplete', 'false') = 'true' THEN '⚠ FX incomplete — some crypto excluded' ELSE 'FX complete' END AS info FROM net_worth_snapshots ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT snapshot_date::timestamptz AS time, total_eur::float AS value FROM net_worth_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(snapshot_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Total return % requires at least two priced net worth snapshots with a baseline; series stays empty until snapshot history exists.

targets.rawSql: SELECT snapshot_date::timestamptz AS time, total_return_pct::float AS value FROM net_worth_snapshots WHERE total_return_pct IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(snapshot_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Portfolio performance (total return %)
